mechanism_narrative: Elevated federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly suppressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC exceeds 0.05 or 20-day forward returns are positive in >60% of instances when FEDFUNDS > 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid three-month increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >55% of triggered instances over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent strength in retail sales and housing starts reflects robust consumer demand and construction activity, generating positive short-term S&P 500 momentum over the next week.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative returns in >60% of occurrences despite meeting thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production indicates healthy manufacturing output and capacity utilization, supporting positive equity returns over the next month during expansionary phases.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 or forward returns are negative in >55% of triggered instances during mid-cycle expansion.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of elevated consumer price inflation and restrictive policy rates creates a stagflationary environment that compresses profit margins and suppresses quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Returns are positive in >50% of periods where both thresholds are simultaneously breached.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects a resilient labor market, providing immediate positive sentiment that lifts S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Payroll growth fails to predict weekly returns (t-stat < 1.5) across multiple rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly GDP growth rate falling below 1.5 percent signals demand exhaustion and reduced corporate revenue expectations, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >65% of low-growth quarters over a 10-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between contracting industrial output and rising joblessness confirms a broad economic slowdown, causing immediate risk-off positioning and negative weekly equity returns.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines for 2 consecutive months and UNRATE rises
failure_condition: The joint signal yields positive returns in >55% of triggered instances during historical downturns.
